topic: I drove through a town that was not on any map I owned
title: I Drove Through a Town That Was Not on Any Map I Owned | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I drove through a town called Halsey. It is not on any map. It does not exist.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small midwestern main street at dusk, a single storefront with a HALSEY GROCERY sign in faded letters, two old cars parked along the curb, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cross-country move. Last spring. Pennsylvania to Oregon.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from a car windshield of a long flat highway at sunset, the road stretching to the horizon, packed boxes visible through the rear window, mountains in the distance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Got off the interstate to find a diner.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a rural exit ramp from a major interstate at evening, an unlit BUSINESS DISTRICT sign at the bottom of the ramp, surrounding farmland flat and empty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two miles down. A welcome sign. Halsey. Population three twelve.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green metal welcome sign on a wooden post on the side of a rural road, the town name and population number visible, the paint slightly faded, evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Diner was open. Two cars in the lot.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small diner with a flat roof and a glowing OPEN sign in the window at dusk, two older sedans parked outside, the diner's interior lights glowing yellow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Waitress poured coffee. Cook flipped burgers. Two old men at the counter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a small diner at evening seen from a booth toward the counter, two figures sitting at the counter visible from behind, a cook visible past them at the grill, no other customers, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a diner counter with a paper receipt and a few dollar bills under a coffee cup, dim diner lighting, the surrounding diner blurred in soft focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two hours later I checked the GPS. No record of any town.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone GPS map displayed on a car dashboard mount, the route highlighted but no town name visible at the location passed, evening light through the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Stopped at a gas station. Asked the clerk about Halsey.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot of a gas station counter at night, a clerk visible from behind at the register, fluorescent overhead lighting, snack racks on either side, no other customers, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Never heard of it. State maps. County records. Nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a folded paper road map of a state spread on the hood of a car, a finger tracing along a rural highway, no town label at the location, evening light flat, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went back the next morning. Same exit. Drove the two miles.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from a car windshield of a rural road at morning, flat farmland on both sides, no welcome sign visible, the road continuing into empty fields, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No town. No diner. Just empty fields and a foundation slab.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an overgrown concrete foundation slab in a flat empty field, weeds growing through cracks, no buildings, morning light flat and grey, vertical 9:16 framing
